performance.name: An Acoustic Evening Tour Live TV report from Video Match Telefe

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Duran Duran - The Wild Boys Live Acoustic

An Acoustic Evening Tour 1993

Vélez Sársfield Stadium, April 30th 1993


They played just the intro and the first chorus so I added chords the rest of the song.
They changed a phrase, taking from the second part and singing in the first intro.


[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]
The Wild Boys are calling on their way back from the fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
In August moon's surrender to a dust cloud on the rise[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Wild Boys fallen far from glory[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
Reckless and so hungered on the razor's edge you trail[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
Because there's murder by the roadside in a sore, afraid new world[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
"They tried to tame you" looks like they'll try again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Wild Boys never lose it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Wild Boys never chose this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]A7[/ch]
Wild Boys never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wild Boys always shine[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
You got sirens for a welcome,there's blood stains for your pain[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
And your telephone been ringing while you're dancing in the rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Wild Boys wonder where is glory[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
Where is all you angels now the figureheads have fell[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
And lovers war with arrows over secrets they could tell[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
They tried to tame you, looks like they'll try again[/tab]
